site.name: Kaziranga House
site.description: Your one-stop hub for all things Kaziranga House. Catch the latest Kaziranga Tak reels, check upcoming events, read our blogs, and access study materials.
site.footerNote: Built with intention for the wild ones.

tak.sectionSubtitle: Two members, a recorder, and endless group chat chaos. Catch up on the latest episode straight from Instagram.

reels.title: Latest Kaziranga Tak Episode
reels.description: Our latest episode discussing what happened in the Kaziranga WhatsApp group this week!

events.sectionSubtitle: Gatherings, competitions, and meetups. See what the house has been up to.

events.title: Intra-House Quiz Night
events.description: A fun quiz night for all Kaziranga House members. Test your general knowledge!

events.title: Movie Night: Jungle Edition
events.description: Ongoing movie marathon featuring films set in wild jungles and national parks.

events.title: Kaziranga House Sports Day
events.description: Annual sports day event featuring cricket, badminton, and chess tournaments.

events.title: Kaziranga Meetup — Season 1
events.description: First ever in-person meetup of Kaziranga House members! A wonderful evening of conversations.

blogs.sectionSubtitle: Perspectives, reviews, and memories written by members of Kaziranga House.

study.sectionSubtitle: Quick access to all essential study resources for the IITM BS Data Science program.
